search_queries_used: DHA telehealth dizziness clinical guideline PDF
population_applicability: Broad dizziness population appears applicable, but no precise age range is stated in the applicability section.
setting_applicability: Partial: exact source is limited to DHA-licensed telehealth services.
UAE_applicability: Verified for Dubai and DHA-licensed telehealth only; broader UAE applicability is not asserted.
recency_verification: Official Version/Issue 2 copies were opened on 2026-07-11; each states a revision date of 2029-02-21.
superseded_check: DHA official portal checked on 2026-07-11; no newer official issue was identified there.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The reviewed 2. Scope; 3. Purpose; 4. Applicability section is directly relevant to documenting Dizziness, subject to the recorded population and setting limitations.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Defines Dubai telehealth dizziness scope and emergency/controlled-medication exclusions.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The reviewed 5.1 Virtual Clinical Assessment section is directly relevant to documenting Dizziness, subject to the recorded population and setting limitations.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Emphasises structured history and available examination to distinguish dizziness syndromes.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The reviewed 6. Red Flags section is directly relevant to documenting Dizziness, subject to the recorded population and setting limitations.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Lists cardiac, neurologic, trauma, intoxication, visual, consciousness, and severe-headache concerns.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The reviewed 7. Clinical History section is directly relevant to documenting Dizziness, subject to the recorded population and setting limitations.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Specifies symptom description, timing, triggers, concurrent symptoms, age, and pre-existing conditions.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The reviewed 8. Investigations section is directly relevant to documenting Dizziness, subject to the recorded population and setting limitations.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: States that tests depend on history and examination and should be documented only when clinically deemed necessary.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: The reviewed 10. Referral Criteria section is directly relevant to documenting Dizziness, subject to the recorded population and setting limitations.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Identifies emergency and specialist referral features for dizziness.

unresolved_source_gaps: The baseline workflow is setting-agnostic and therefore broader than the exact source.
